title: Paper & Pen vs QuickBooks
metaTitle: Paper & Pen vs QuickBooks · Free QuickBooks Alternative · Paper & Pen
metaDescription: Compare Paper & Pen and QuickBooks on price, free plan, Arabic RTL, multi-currency and GCC VAT. A free, Arabic-first QuickBooks alternative that works worldwide.
keywords: paper and pen vs quickbooks, quickbooks alternative, free quickbooks alternative, quickbooks pricing, arabic accounting software, gcc invoicing software
heroSubtitle: QuickBooks is a polished, popular accounting product. Paper & Pen is a free, Arabic-first ERP that bills in any currency, takes local payments and fits the GCC out of the box. An honest comparison.
heroBullets: Arabic RTL plus four more languages
Native OMR, AED, SAR and GCC 5% VAT

features.title: Free core
features.desc: Invoicing and sales are free forever, with no monthly subscription required to send invoices.

features.title: Arabic-first
features.desc: Full right-to-left Arabic interface and documents, with English, Hindi, Bengali and Urdu too.

features.title: Local payments
features.desc: Paymob and regional gateways are built in, so Gulf customers pay by card without extra setup.

sections.title: Where QuickBooks is strong
sections.body: QuickBooks is a refined, widely adopted product with a clean interface, strong bank-feed integrations in its core markets and a large accountant network familiar with it. For US, UK and similar markets, it is a comfortable, capable choice with a deep partner ecosystem.
items: Strong bank feeds in core markets

sections.title: Free, Arabic and built for the region
sections.body: Paper & Pen starts genuinely free for unlimited invoicing, runs a true Arabic right-to-left interface, and bills natively in OMR, AED and SAR with the correct decimals. GCC 5% VAT and Paymob card payments are preset, and you get the full ERP path (Inventory, HR, Accounting, Manufacturing) when you need it, all from one free starting point.
items: Free forever core, no monthly floor
Genuine Arabic RTL, end to end
Gulf currencies, 5% VAT and Paymob preset

faqs.q: Is Paper & Pen a good QuickBooks alternative?
faqs.a: Yes, especially in the GCC and for Arabic-speaking teams that want a free invoicing core and native Gulf currencies. QuickBooks is excellent in its core markets, but it has no free-forever plan and limited Arabic support.

faqs.q: Is Paper & Pen free unlike QuickBooks?
faqs.a: Sales and invoicing are free forever with no monthly subscription. You only pay for optional modules such as Inventory, HR or Accounting.
Yes, on the free core. You can invoice in OMR, AED, SAR, USD, EUR and more, with correct decimals per document.

faqs.q: Can customers pay invoices by card?
faqs.a: Yes. Paymob and regional gateways are built in, so customers across the GCC and beyond pay from the invoice link.

faqs.q: Is it ready for GCC VAT?
faqs.a: Yes. The 5% GCC VAT rate is preset, and tax is fully configurable for any other country.

ctaSub: Create a free workspace and send your first invoice in minutes. Arabic-ready, multi-currency, free forever.
